summary: Frontend-only E2E retest of Kontengrafi v2 editorial redesign completed. 52/52 functional assertions pass. All sections, hero massive headline, side counter, brand label, contact CTAs, palette, responsive widths, and mobile hamburger validated.
tests_executed: Hero massive headline contains 'NEXT GENERATION CONTENT' with 'Content' span color rgb(61,123,255) (#3D7BFF)
Hero meta strip contains 'Based in Indonesia' and '© 2026'
About section: h2 'Visual Identity' (serif italic) + 2-image stack (fashion + food)
Services: 5 rows present — service-row-ugc, -fashion, -f&b, -product, -video. service-row-fashion has highlight bg rgba(0,71,255,0.15)

Portfolio Tabs: default photo active; clicking Video switches data-state=active; captions 'Velvet Drop — Fashion Lookbook', 'Pour Series — Cold Brew', 'Brand Film — Aurelle SS26', 'Latte Pour Reel' all present (verified via text_content + visual screenshot)
Contact: massive 'LET'S MAKE SOMETHING' headline; WhatsApp wa.me + _blank; Instagram instagram.com + _blank; TikTok tiktok.com + _blank; Email mailto:halo@kontengrafi.id
Palette: hero bg rgb(10,26,74) #0A1A4A; services bg rgb(10,26,74); blue accents #0047FF/#3D7BFF; no purple/indigo/green-neon found in any computed style
Mobile hamburger (<=1024): toggle visible, opens menu with 5 large uppercase nav links and numeric prefixes (01..05)
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Portfolio Card data-testid slug uses replaceAll('—','') which leaves a double dash (e.g., 'portfolio-item-velvet-drop--fashion-lookbook'). Cosmetic only — testids still unique. Consider a single slugify helper.

Minor: service-row data-testid for F&B contains an ampersand ('service-row-f&b'). Works in Playwright attribute selectors but is unusual; consider 'service-row-fnb' for safety in tooling that doesn't escape.
Hero side-counter uses .hidden.md:flex which is correct for desktop; on tablet 1024 it is visible — matches spec.
All interactive elements have proper data-testid coverage. No accessibility blockers observed; CTAs have target=_blank + rel=noopener noreferrer.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Static React landing page (no backend). v2 editorial redesign validated end-to-end. Note: portfolio captions live inside shadcn TabsContent; use text_content() rather than inner_text() to assert captions across inactive tabs.
